channel.title: STR — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on STR (Sitio Royalties) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Howard Marks: NEW POSITION STR · Q3 2025
item.description: Howard Marks (Oaktree Capital) new position STR in Q3 2025 · 5.1% of portfolio. New Sitio Royalties — mineral rights.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Howard Marks)
